_comment: Installer-only file. Restaurant info is NEVER set here — the owner provides it via Telegram during onboarding, and the orchestrator writes it to social-marketing/restaurant-profile.json. This file holds API plumbing only.

composio._comment: All external calls from this VM are authorized by Composio. The Project holds OAuth connections (Instagram/TikTok/Facebook/Drive) plus the OpenRouter credential for image generation and vision. There are no other API keys on the VM. All five fields come from Jules's provisioning step for this restaurant.

imageGen._comment: Image generation only. Chat, captions, and research all run on Hermes's configured model — not set here. The model is fetched through Composio's proxy using the Project's OpenRouter credential. Update when a new image model ships on OpenRouter (https://openrouter.ai/models).
